linked_context.page_description: Live audit log of every command, file, and network connection a Claude Code (or any matched) session makes, from the kernel. - yeet-src/claudefeed
linked_context.page_excerpt:
tail -f for Claude Code. Every command a session runs, every file it opens, every TCP port it reaches or binds — decoded and streamed live to your terminal. Scoped to that session's process subtree. No other PIDs, no noise.

claudefeed turns a Claude Code session into a live, decoded audit log: every exec (with full argv), every openat , and every outbound or bound TCP port — for the matched session and its entire subtree.

Where its sibling claudetree paints who is running as a live process tree, claudefeed is the companion that tree promised: the tail -f of what they did .

hacker_news.title: Nagent, an LLM loop reference implementation
hacker_news.author: MintPaw
hacker_news.summary: Contribute to macton/nagent development by creating an account on GitHub.

linked_context.page_description: Contribute to macton/nagent development by creating an account on GitHub.
linked_context.page_excerpt:
The word "agent" suggests continuity, intent, and memory that a typical LLM loop does not actually provide. nagent is a small reference implementation. It shows what terminal "agent-like" workflows are when you describe the mechanics instead of the metaphor.

nagent is a small reference example of a data-oriented approach to AI workflows.

If a generator produces output you do not like, fix the generator or the inputs to that generator. Do not merely patch the generated output and leave the bad input in place. In nagent, the conversation prompt is one of those inputs. If it matters, it needs to be saveable, maintainable, organizable, and editable.

hacker_news.title: Reticulum Network
hacker_news.author: josh-sematic
hacker_news.summary:
Reticulum is a cryptography-based networking stack for building both local and wide-area networks with readily available hardware, that can continue to operate under adverse conditions, such as extremely low bandwidth and very high latency.

To understand the foundational philosophy and goals of this system, read the Zen of Reticulum .

Reticulum allows you to build wide-area networks with off-the-shelf tools, and offers end-to-end encryption, forward secrecy, autoconfiguring cryptographically backed multi-hop transport, efficient addressing, unforgeable packet acknowledgements and more.

hacker_news.title: Ask HN: Is software engineering still a good career choice for new students?
hacker_news.author: iliashad
hacker_news.content_context:
I asked 4 working engineers this exact question on my podcast: a Google Developer Advocate (Stockholm), a Senior Software Engineer/consultant (Paris), an NVIDIA Deep Learning Institute Instructor (Morocco), and an Infrastructure Engineer at IBM (Dublin).

Here's what they actually said:

- The Senior Software Engineer said: "LLMs are babies. If you don't understand the architecture behind everything, you won't be able to follow."

- The Google advocate pushed back slightly: "Writing code has become a commodity, like car manufacturing after automation. The question isn't whether to learn to code, it's why you want to."

- The IBM infrastructure engineer had the most actionable take: "Don't treat AI as a ghostwriter. Never commit code you can't explain. Use it as a tutor, not a replacement for your own thinking."

And many more

We also reacted to a clip of a Silicon Valley exec telling university graduates that "AI is the next industrial revolution" and getting booed by the crowd.

One of the more sobering parts: at current usage levels, Anthropic is likely losing money on heavy Claude subscribers. No inference company is profitable today. The Google advocate, who works on... HN comment: Full episode (YouTube): https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=oOt_0N1yQEw

top_trends.title: Nagent, an LLM loop reference implementation
top_trends.author: MintPaw
top_trends.summary: Contribute to macton/nagent development by creating an account on GitHub.

linked_context.page_description: Contribute to macton/nagent development by creating an account on GitHub.
linked_context.page_excerpt:
The word "agent" suggests continuity, intent, and memory that a typical LLM loop does not actually provide. nagent is a small reference implementation. It shows what terminal "agent-like" workflows are when you describe the mechanics instead of the metaphor.

nagent is a small reference example of a data-oriented approach to AI workflows.

If a generator produces output you do not like, fix the generator or the inputs to that generator. Do not merely patch the generated output and leave the bad input in place. In nagent, the conversation prompt is one of those inputs. If it matters, it needs to be saveable, maintainable, organizable, and editable.

top_trends.title: Reticulum Network
top_trends.author: josh-sematic
top_trends.summary:
Reticulum is a cryptography-based networking stack for building both local and wide-area networks with readily available hardware, that can continue to operate under adverse conditions, such as extremely low bandwidth and very high latency.

To understand the foundational philosophy and goals of this system, read the Zen of Reticulum .

Reticulum allows you to build wide-area networks with off-the-shelf tools, and offers end-to-end encryption, forward secrecy, autoconfiguring cryptographically backed multi-hop transport, efficient addressing, unforgeable packet acknowledgements and more.

top_trends.title: Ask HN: Is software engineering still a good career choice for new students?
top_trends.author: iliashad
top_trends.content_context:
I asked 4 working engineers this exact question on my podcast: a Google Developer Advocate (Stockholm), a Senior Software Engineer/consultant (Paris), an NVIDIA Deep Learning Institute Instructor (Morocco), and an Infrastructure Engineer at IBM (Dublin).

Here's what they actually said:

- The Senior Software Engineer said: "LLMs are babies. If you don't understand the architecture behind everything, you won't be able to follow."

- The Google advocate pushed back slightly: "Writing code has become a commodity, like car manufacturing after automation. The question isn't whether to learn to code, it's why you want to."

- The IBM infrastructure engineer had the most actionable take: "Don't treat AI as a ghostwriter. Never commit code you can't explain. Use it as a tutor, not a replacement for your own thinking."

And many more

We also reacted to a clip of a Silicon Valley exec telling university graduates that "AI is the next industrial revolution" and getting booed by the crowd.

One of the more sobering parts: at current usage levels, Anthropic is likely losing money on heavy Claude subscribers. No inference company is profitable today. The Google advocate, who works on... HN comment: Full episode (YouTube): https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=oOt_0N1yQEw

named_hotspots.name: Goose
named_hotspots.what_happened: 一个名为Goose的开源、可扩展AI代理项目在GitHub上趋势飙升，单日新增490颗星，总星数已达48467。
named_hotspots.core_details: Goose是一个用Rust语言编写的AI代理，其核心功能超越了传统的代码建议，能够执行安装、运行、编辑和测试等任务，并支持与任何大型语言模型（LLM）集成。项目由blackgirlbytes、angiejones等开发者共同构建。

named_hotspots.value_check: 作为开源项目，Goose提供了可定制的基础设施，可能对希望构建或集成AI代理的开发者有实用价值，但其成熟度和生产就绪性尚待验证。
named_hotspots.follow_up: 关注其版本迭代、社区贡献增长以及在实际开发场景中的用例反馈。

named_hotspots.name: AI工具系统提示词与模型合集
named_hotspots.what_happened: 一个名为“system-prompts-and-models-of-ai-tools”的GitHub仓库在趋势榜上热度飙升，单日新增66星，总星数已达139127。该项目旨在收集和整理各类AI编程工具的系统提示词、内部工具及模型信息。
named_hotspots.core_details: 该项目由用户x1xhlol创建和维护，列出了包括Cursor、Devin AI、Replit、VSCode Agent、Warp.dev、Perplexity、Claude Code等超过25款知名AI辅助编程工具和平台的相关内部资料。仓库内容覆盖了这些工具的“系统提示词”（System Prompts）和可能的模型细节，目标是为开发者和研究者提供一个集中的参考资源。
named_hotspots.ai_take: 该项目反映了AI编程工具生态的蓬勃发展和社区对“逆向工程”或理解这些工具内部工作机制的强烈兴趣。通过汇集这些通常不公开的“系统提示词”，它可能帮助开发者更好地定制、集成或构建类似的AI编程助手，甚至推动相关工具变得更加透明和可定制。
named_hotspots.hype_check: 热度很高。单日新增大量关注，总星数超过13万，表明其在开发者社区中引起了广泛共鸣。这种热度源于对主流AI编程工具“黑箱”部分的好奇心以及实际开发中的集成需求。
named_hotspots.value_check: 潜在价值显著，但需谨慎使用。对于研究AI助手行为、进行提示工程或开发兼容性工具的开发者和研究者来说，这是一个宝贵的资料库。然而，其中包含的信息可能涉及版权或服务条款问题，且其准确性和时效性需要用户自行验证。
named_hotspots.follow_up: 关注该仓库的持续更新，看其是否会纳入更多工具或提供更深入的分析。同时，观察列出的AI工具公司是否会对此类信息收集做出官方回应或调整其策略。
named_hotspots.evidence: 项目在GitHub趋势榜排名靠前（趋势得分81.83），拥有极高的总星数（139127）和可观的讨论量（评论数34558）。项目描述明确列出了所涵盖的AI工具名称，包括Cursor、Devin AI、Replit、Perplexity等。

source_briefs.content_summary: 这是一个名为“last30days-skill”的AI代理技能项目，使用Python语言开发。其核心功能是研究任何主题，信息来源覆盖Reddit、X（原Twitter）、YouTube、Hacker News、Polymarket以及整个网络，然后综合生成一份有依据的摘要。该项目今日新增3177颗星，总星数已达37173。
source_briefs.ai_comment: 该项目展示了AI代理在跨平台信息检索与摘要生成方面的应用潜力，是构建自动化研究工具的一个实例。

source_briefs.content_summary: 这是一个名为“ChinaTextbook”的仓库，收集了涵盖中国小学、初中、高中乃至大学的所有PDF格式教材。该项目使用Roff语言，今日新增517颗星，总星数高达73445。
source_briefs.ai_comment: 该项目提供了一个集中的教育资源库，对教育者和学生具有实用价值，也反映了开源社区在知识共享方面的努力。

source_briefs.content_summary: 这是著名的开源计算机视觉库OpenCV的官方仓库，使用C++语言编写。作为计算机视觉领域的基石项目，它今日新增169颗星，总星数达到88600。
source_briefs.ai_comment: OpenCV的持续流行凸显了计算机视觉技术在AI和自动化领域的基础性与广泛应用。

source_briefs.content_summary: Aspen是一款旨在让普通用户也能使用的本地大语言模型应用。其核心卖点是隐私保护，完全在用户自己的硬件上运行，无需订阅、无需云端服务，也无人能读取用户的对话。应用无需终端或复杂配置，下载即可使用，支持Windows和iPhone，且永久免费。开发者提到，他们因大量使用Claude等云端AI进行编码（包括24/7运行AI代理）而对数据隐私感到担忧，从而催生了这个项目。
source_briefs.ai_comment: Aspen代表了AI应用向本地化、隐私优先方向发展的趋势，旨在降低用户使用门槛并解决对云端服务的数据安全顾虑。

source_briefs.item_name: Show HN: Live audit log of every command, file, network connection by Claude
source_briefs.content_summary: 项目“claudefeed”提供了一个实时审计日志工具，专门用于监控Claude Code（或任何匹配的）会话。它从内核层面捕获并实时输出会话及其所有子进程执行的每一条命令（包括完整参数）、打开的每一个文件以及建立的每一个TCP网络连接，并将这些信息解码后流式传输到终端，相当于为Claude Code会话提供了一个专属的“tail -f”审计日志。
source_briefs.ai_comment: 该工具增强了AI代码助手会话的透明度和可审计性，有助于开发者理解和监控AI代理在后台的具体操作，对安全和调试有重要意义。

source_briefs.item_name: Nagent, an LLM loop reference implementation
source_briefs.content_summary: “nagent”是一个关于LLM（大语言模型）循环工作流的参考实现。项目指出，常见的“智能体”概念往往暗示了连续性、意图和记忆，但典型的LLM循环并不真正具备这些。nagent采用数据导向的方法，展示了终端“类智能体”工作流的实际机制。其核心思想是：如果生成器的输出不理想，应该修复生成器或其输入（如对话提示词），而不是仅仅修补输出却保留错误的输入。因此，对话提示词等输入需要是可保存、可维护、可组织和可编辑的。
source_briefs.ai_comment: 该项目是对当前AI智能体工作流的一种解构和务实反思，强调从数据和输入层面进行系统性改进，而非依赖隐喻性的“智能体”概念。

source_briefs.item_name: House is set to fund Trump’s immigration actions for the rest of his time in the White House - AP News
source_briefs.content_summary: 美国众议院通过了一项价值约700亿美元的共和党移民法案，旨在为特朗普总统任期剩余时间内的移民执法行动提供资金，包括资助移民和海关执法局（ICE）及边境巡逻队直至其任期结束。该法案在经历了数周共和党内部的延迟后得以推进。
source_briefs.ai_comment: 此政治动向表明美国国会正在为现任政府的核心移民政策提供长期资金保障，可能对未来一段时期的移民执法产生持续影响。

source_briefs.item_name: Live Updates: U.S. launches retaliatory strikes after Trump says Iran shot down Apache helicopter - CBS News
source_briefs.content_summary: 在特朗普声称伊朗于霍尔木兹海峡上空击落一架美军阿帕奇直升机后，美国中央司令部（CENTCOM）证实已对伊朗发动报复性打击。特朗普表示美国“必须”对此作出回应。事件引发了持续的实时新闻报道。
source_briefs.ai_comment: 这一事件标志着美伊紧张局势的又一次升级，军事对抗从指控迅速演变为实际的报复性行动。

source_briefs.item_name: White House will be closed to reporters during UFC fight — unless UFC lets them in - The Washington Post
source_briefs.content_summary: 白宫即将举办一场UFC（终极格斗冠军赛）赛事，但届时将对记者关闭，除非记者获得UFC发放的采访证件。此举意味着UFC控制了此次白宫活动的媒体准入权。此外，为筹备此次活动，华盛顿特区计划实施大范围道路封闭。活动前一天，一个支持特朗普的超级政治行动委员会还将举办每人100万美元的筹款活动。
source_briefs.ai_comment: 此事凸显了大型商业体育赛事与政治场所结合时产生的独特后勤挑战与媒体准入争议，反映了活动组织权的非传统转移。

summary.closing_note: 总体来看，今日热点聚焦于AI代理的自动化能力提升、开发工具的效率优化以及教育资源的数字化集合。开发者社区对实用、高性能的开源工具展现出强烈兴趣，但需关注项目的长期维护、法律合规性及实际生产就绪度。建议持续跟踪这些项目的版本更新与生态发展，以把握技术落地的前沿动态。
